scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules pnpm-lock.yaml && pnpm -r run clean
scripts.setup: pnpm -F prisma-generator-zod-local build && pnpm -F prisma-my-db run generate && pnpm -F @receipts/shared-schemas build
scripts.build:client: pnpm run setup && pnpm -F client run build
scripts.build:server: pnpm run setup && pnpm -F prisma-my-db run build && pnpm -F backend run build
